name: Container Image Vulnerability Scan
description: Ensures container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment
query: SELECT id, image, tag, last_scan_date, critical_vulns, high_vulns FROM container_images WHERE last_scan_date IS NULL OR last_scan_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Integrate container image scanning into CI/CD pipeline. Block images with critical vulnerabilities.
